criteria.description: Successful upload updates delivery state, never deletes the event payload
criteria.evidence: WP05 ledger (no delete surface) + WP07 dispatcher (never deletes); tests: test_record_success_is_terminal_and_does_not_delete_journal, test_success_is_non_destructive
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Per-event/per-target delivery ledger answers 'was X delivered to Y'
criteria.evidence: WP04 targets + WP05 ledger (PK event_id,target_id); tests: tests/delivery/test_ledger.py, test_targets.py
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Event journal is target-independent (no target/server/delivery field)
criteria.evidence: WP03 event_journal; test: tests/event_journal/test_journal.py (Event carries no delivery state)
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: sync now selects only events lacking terminal successful delivery for the active target
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Changing sync server re-delivers the same retained events to the new target
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.
Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Delivery to an operator's own endpoint via the same ledger machinery
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Local stub receiver lets tests/fork-CI run with no Teamspace credentials
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: sync status reports retained count and per-target delivery counts separately
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Destructive cleanup only via explicit sync gc/sync archive, preserving ledger history
criteria.evidence: WP11 retention + WP12 CLI; tests: gc_payloads/archive_payloads (delivered-only purge, ledger preserved)
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Coalescing never mutates an already-delivered event
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Notice/offer to re-drain when a stable URL's deployment identity changes
criteria.notes: MVP scope: advisory scaffolding only. Full reset-detection consumes SaaS /health metadata, deferred to IC-09 follow-on (C-004). Spec defers this by design.

criteria.description: Existing hash-scoped queue DBs migrate into the journal without losing queued payloads
criteria.evidence: WP10 migrate_journal; test: tests/sync/test_migrate_journal.py (multi-DB, unknown digest)
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Each target type implements one explicit DeliveryReceiver contract
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Permanently-failed events recorded terminal-failed, excluded from drains, retained/inspectable
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.evidence: WP01 ResolvedSyncTarget + WP02 wiring; tests: test_target_authority.py, test_target_authority_wiring.py
criteria.notes: MVP: 7 surfaces wired. tracker base-URL (tracker/saas_client.py) + WebSocket URL (sync/client.py) bindings are not in any WP's owned_files; follow-up to thread the resolver there (D-019).

criteria.description: Teamspace-bound facts captured in SQLite/git before auth/team/sync/network gates
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: Divergent duplicate event_id rows quarantined/audited, never overwritten/merged
criteria.evidence: WP10; test: divergent-dup conflict (audit row, source DB read-only, exit_code=1)
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.

criteria.description: sync status --check --json exposes target authority, journal, delivery, terminal, migration, body-upload sections
criteria.evidence: WP11 build_status_report + WP12; test: test_status_check_json_is_additive (7 sections + legacy fields preserved)
criteria.notes: Verified by independent per-WP review + unit tests; integration confirmation at mission-review.
